name: Chicken a La King
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Add green peppers, mushrooms, and pimentos to the saucepan.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in flour and blend well into the mixture.
5. Add three-quarters of the heavy cream and all the chicken broth.
6. Cover and cook over low heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
7. Stir in sherry, salt, cayenne, and paprika.
8. Beat egg yolks and combine with the remaining heavy cream.
9. Slowly stir this mixture into the sauce.
10. Add cooked chicken and heat gently without boiling.
11. Serve over toast or in shells.
